- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Finance Tracker application with React frontend, Python Flask backend, and MongoDB database. Starting with login page and authentication.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created project structure with frontend and backend folders and core files.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Added LoginPage component with registration and login functionality, Dashboard page, Backend Flask authentication service with JWT tokens and bcrypt password hashing.

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	No specific extensions required for this development setup.

- [ ] Compile the Project
	Backend requires Python dependencies and Frontend requires npm packages.

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	Tasks will be created for running frontend and backend servers.

- [ ] Launch the Project
	Both frontend (React) and backend (Flask) need to be running.

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with full project documentation and setup instructions.
